evals.name: validate-january-findings
evals.prompt:
Validuj tieto najdy z analyzy zmluv za januar 2026:

1. Vikendove zverejnenie 31.1.2026 (sobota) — Slovak Telekom 22.7M, Alanata 14.8M EUR
2. Ejoin s.r.o. (ICO 51900921) — dvojity dlznik VSZP+SocPoist, zmluva 97K EUR
3. Sulc Matej — 659 zmluv so STVR za 747K EUR, potencialne delenie zakazky
4. Fond na podporu sportu — 60 000 000 EUR okruhla suma
5. UK Bratislava — 206.5M EUR dotacia od Ministerstva skolstva
6. SMART CORPORATION s.r.o. — 9.25M EUR bez ICO na nahradne diely
7. Operacne stredisko ZZS SR — 30.8M EUR, zaporne vlastne imanie -2.65M EUR

Pouzij Datasette na validacne dopyty.
evals.expected_output: Structured validation report classifying each finding as CONFIRMED, DISMISSED, or INCONCLUSIVE with evidence.

assertions.name: dismisses_university_dotacia
assertions.check: Finding #5 (UK Bratislava 206.5M) is DISMISSED as a standard ministry-to-university annual dotacia

assertions.name: dismisses_round_amount_grant
assertions.check: Finding #4 (Fond na podporu sportu 60M) is DISMISSED as a standard state fund allocation with naturally round amount

assertions.name: dismisses_sulc_matej
assertions.check: Finding #3 (Sulc Matej 659 contracts with STVR) is DISMISSED as freelancer micro-contracts for a broadcaster

assertions.name: confirms_or_inconclusive_ejoin
assertions.check: Finding #2 (Ejoin double debtor) is CONFIRMED or INCONCLUSIVE — NOT dismissed, because being a double debtor while receiving public money is genuinely problematic

assertions.name: validates_weekend_publishing
assertions.check: Finding #1 (weekend publishing) runs a validation query to check if 31.1.2026 was end-of-month and how many other contracts were published that day

assertions.name: checks_state_org_equity
assertions.check: Finding #7 (OSZZS negative equity) is checked whether OSZZS is a state organization — state orgs can have negative equity by design

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output follows the template: Sumar validacie, CONFIRMED najdy, INCONCLUSIVE najdy, Preverene a vylucene (DISMISSED) table

assertions.name: runs_validation_queries
assertions.check: At least 3 validation SQL queries are actually executed against Datasette or local DB to verify findings

evals.name: validate-mixed-findings-feb
evals.prompt:
Tu su najdy z februara 2026 na validaciu:

1. WAY INDUSTRIES a.s. (ICO 44965257) — 145M EUR od MO SR, dlznik VSZP (62K) aj SocPoist (179K)
2. Angel Antonio Carbonell Barrachina — 169 zmluv s Min. skolstva za 2.9M bez ICO
3. PERSET a.s. + Asset Real a.s. — po 32.57M EUR pre Bratislavu, rovnake sumy
4. SFINGA s.r.o. — zmluva za 1.29M EUR zverejnena 489 dni po podpise
5. Ministerstvo dopravy → SFRB — 490M EUR jedina zmluva
6. Jana KEPICOVA — 13 382 zmluv za 85.6M EUR bez ICO

Over kazdy najd a zarad ho ako CONFIRMED, DISMISSED, alebo INCONCLUSIVE.
evals.expected_output: Validation report that correctly identifies the SFRB contract and KEPICOVA as likely false positives, while confirming WAY INDUSTRIES and SFINGA as genuinely suspicious.

assertions.name: dismisses_sfrb
assertions.check: Finding #5 (MD → SFRB 490M) is DISMISSED as standard housing fund budget transfer

assertions.name: investigates_kepicova
assertions.check: Finding #6 (Jana KEPICOVA 13K contracts) is investigated as a data artifact — likely NULL ICO grouping of many distinct individuals

assertions.name: confirms_way_industries
assertions.check: Finding #1 (WAY INDUSTRIES double debtor 145M) is CONFIRMED or at minimum INCONCLUSIVE — a double debtor receiving 145M is genuinely concerning

assertions.name: confirms_sfinga_delay
assertions.check: Finding #4 (SFINGA 489 days late) is CONFIRMED or INCONCLUSIVE after checking it's not an EU/Erasmus grant

assertions.name: investigates_perset_twin
assertions.check: Finding #3 (PERSET + Asset Real identical amounts) is investigated for ownership links — identical amounts published at same time is suspicious

evals.name: validate-all-innocent
evals.prompt:
Over tieto najdy z Q4 2025:

1. TATRA DEFENCE SYSTEMS — 1.03 mld EUR od Ministerstva obrany (ramcova zmluva)
2. Environmentalny fond — 30M EUR okruhla suma pre Vodohospodarsku vystavbu
3. Fond na podporu vzdelavania → Tomas Hengerics — 457 zmluv za 4.2M EUR
4. Hruzova Zuzana, Bc. — 506 zmluv za 13.6M EUR bez ICO
5. Eduardo Carmona — 49 zmluv pre APVV po 700 EUR

Su tieto najdy skutocne podozrive, alebo maju nevine vysvetlenie?

assertions.name: dismisses_env_fund
assertions.check: Finding #2 (Environmentalny fond 30M) is DISMISSED as standard environmental dotacia with naturally round amount

assertions.name: dismisses_student_loans
assertions.check: Finding #3 (Fond na podporu vzdelavania → Hengerics) is DISMISSED as student loan fund operations

assertions.name: investigates_null_ico_grouping
assertions.check: Finding #4 (Hruzova Zuzana) is investigated for NULL ICO grouping — runs a validation query to check if it's one person or many grouped together

assertions.name: dismisses_apvv_reviewers
assertions.check: Finding #5 (Eduardo Carmona 49 contracts for APVV) is DISMISSED as peer review/evaluation contracts for research agency

assertions.name: defense_contract_inconclusive
assertions.check: Finding #1 (TATRA DEFENCE 1B) is either CONFIRMED for further procurement check or INCONCLUSIVE — a billion EUR contract warrants at minimum UVO verification even if defense contracts are expected to be large
